name: McKesson Corporation
description: McKesson Corporation is a diversified healthcare services leader that plays a critical role in the global healthcare ecosystem. The company specializes in the distribution of pharmaceuticals and medical supplies, while providing innovative technology, oncology and multispecialty solutions, and biopharma services. By connecting products, partners, and patients, McKesson supports healthcare providers, pharmacies, and biopharma companies in navigating complex care environments. Headquartered in the United States, the organization is committed to improving patient outcomes and advancing health equity through its extensive supply chain, clinical expertise, and data-driven insights across the entire healthcare landscape.
